threats.title: AutoJack Attack Lets One Web Page Hijack AI Agent for Host Code Execution
threats.summary: Microsoft researchers have detailed an exploit chain, named AutoJack, that turns an AI browsing agent into a delivery vehicle for remote code execution. Steer the agent to load an attacker's web page, and that page's JavaScript can reach a privileged local service on the same machine and spawn a process on the host. No credentials, no sign-in screen, and no further user interaction once

threats.title: Operation Endgame Disrupts SocGholish Servers, Cleans 14,971 WordPress Sites
threats.summary: Dutch law enforcement authorities, along with counterparts from Canada , Germany, and the U.S., have disrupted malicious infrastructure associated with SocGholish and cleaned up nearly 15,000 infected WordPress websites. threats.title: CISA Warns Fortinet Customers as FortiBleed Hits 86,644 FortiGate Devices
threats.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Thursday urged Fortinet customers with FortiGate appliances to take steps to secure against ongoing malicious activity aimed at thousands of internet-accessible devices. threats.title: From Assistive to Agentic: The AI Shift That's Redefining Threat Management
threats.summary: Introduction The average enterprise security team has 40 or more security tools, giving a lot of visibility into internal telemetry and asset data. But often, these tools are working in siloes, generating (overlapping) alerts and data. threats.title: Forget Data Leakage: Shadow AI's Real Threat Is Access Control
threats.summary: The first wave of enterprise AI concern was straightforward. It was simply employees pasting sensitive data into public AI tools.
